According to the authors, the potential conformational epitope of several monoclonal antibodies reside in this linear epitopic region. This is the most common sequence for this epitope: other amino acids occur in positions 92 (G, P or T), 112 (Y or P), 118 (D), 121 (S) and 123 (Y).
